# Omni Shine Cleaning

> Family-run professional cleaning service based in Oldham, Greater Manchester. Founded in 2026 by Sangita Chavda. Serves 14 towns around Oldham. Contact form only — no phone. Email: info@omnishine.co.uk.

## About
- Business name: Omni Shine Cleaning
- Founder: Sangita Chavda
- Founded: 2026
- Location: Oldham, Greater Manchester, United Kingdom
- Contact email: info@omnishine.co.uk
- Opening hours: Mon–Fri 5pm–9pm, Sat–Sun 8am–9pm

## Services and starting prices
- Domestic cleaning — from £18 / hour (two-hour minimum)
- Commercial cleaning — from £22 / hour
- Deep cleaning — from £150 (one-off, fixed)
- End-of-tenancy cleaning — from £180 (fixed, with 72-hour re-clean guarantee)
- After-builders cleaning — from £200 (fixed)

## Areas served
Oldham, Shaw, Royton, Chadderton, Failsworth, Lees, Uppermill, Saddleworth, Springhead, Greenfield, Grotton, Moorside, Rochdale, Delph.

## Payment
Bank transfer, cash, card, Stripe link. Invoices for commercial clients with 7-day terms.

- [Deep cleaning in Oldham](https://omnishine.co.uk/services/deep-cleaning-oldham/)
- [End-of-tenancy cleaning in Oldham](https://omnishine.co.uk/services/end-of-tenancy-cleaning-oldham/)
- [After-builders cleaning in Oldham](https://omnishine.co.uk/services/after-builders-cleaning-oldham/)

## Guarantees
- 72-hour re-clean guarantee on any missed areas
- Eco-friendly products included, fragrance-free on request
- Same cleaner each visit wherever possible
- No weekend surcharge
